tasks.title: Schema migration: add topic_key and superseded_by to pages
tasks.description: Extend applySchema(db) in src/services/folio/db.js with an idempotent migration block that adds topic_key TEXT and superseded_by TEXT columns to the pages table, and creates idx_pages_topic on (folio_id, topic_key). Migration guards against re-running via PRAGMA table_info(pages) column check. Also extend rowToPage in store.js to include topicKey and supersededBy fields.
acceptance_criteria: applySchema(db) runs without error on a fresh DB and on an existing DB that already has the pages table without the new columns
Running applySchema twice on the same DB is a no-op (idempotent)
PRAGMA table_info('pages') on a migrated DB shows topic_key and superseded_by columns
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_pages_topic ON pages(folio_id, topic_key) is present after migration
rowToPage returns topicKey: null and supersededBy: null for pages created before migration
All existing folio tests (folio.test.js, folio-pages-crud.test.js) continue to pass

tasks.title: Store: listPagesByTopics and listDistinctTopicKeys methods
tasks.description: Add two new methods to the FolioStore returned by createFolioStore(db). listPagesByTopics(folioId, topicKeys[]) returns all live pages (superseded_by IS NULL) in the folio whose topic_key is in the provided array, ordered by created_at ASC. Returns [] for empty topicKeys array without hitting SQLite. listDistinctTopicKeys(folioId) returns all distinct non-null topic_key values in the folio, ordered alphabetically. Also extend the updatePage prepared statement to accept topic_key as a nullable update field.
acceptance_criteria: listPagesByTopics(folioId, []) returns [] without executing any SQL
listPagesByTopics(folioId, ['mcp-zod-schema']) returns only live pages (superseded_by IS NULL) with that topic_key for the given folio
listPagesByTopics does not return pages from other folios
listDistinctTopicKeys returns sorted distinct topic_key values, excluding nulls
updatePage accepts topic_key in the updates object and persists the value
updatePage with topic_key: undefined preserves the existing value (COALESCE pattern)
New methods are exported in the store's public interface object
Unit tests cover: empty array, single key with 2 results, multiple keys, cross-folio isolation, superseded_by filter

tasks.title: Injection: cluster expansion in buildContext
tasks.description: Modify buildContext in src/services/folio/injection.js to perform cluster expansion after BM25 threshold hit computation. After thresholdHits is populated: (1) collect unique non-null topicKey values from threshold hits into clusterKeys, (2) if clusterKeys is non-empty call store.listPagesByTopics(folioId, clusterKeys) to retrieve siblings, (3) add siblings to hitMap with rel = cfg.clusterInheritedRel (default: scoreThreshold - 0.01) only when not already present. Add clusterInheritedRel to DEFAULTS and to the opts parameter documentation. Update the function JSDoc. The inline assembly and reference tier code are unchanged.
acceptance_criteria: When a BM25 threshold hit has a non-null topic_key, sibling pages sharing that key are added to hitMap at clusterInheritedRel
Siblings already present in hitMap from BM25 keep their original (higher) rel score
Pages with topic_key: null in threshold hits do not trigger a listPagesByTopics call
clusterInheritedRel defaults to scoreThreshold - 0.01 (1.99 with default threshold)
opts.clusterInheritedRel overrides the default
Cluster expansion siblings with rel below scoreThreshold appear in the referenced list, not inline
The injection integration test (folio-injection-integration.test.js) still passes against the frozen fixture

New unit tests in folio-injection.test.js cover: no topic_key on hits (no expansion), topic_key present (siblings appear in referenced), clusterInheritedRel override, dedup when sibling also matches BM25

tasks.title: Core: reconcilePage in src/services/folio/reconcile.js
tasks.description: Create src/services/folio/reconcile.js with the exported async function reconcilePage(store, folioId, draft, judgeFn). Implement the two-phase gate: Phase 1 (cheap FTS pre-filter via listPagesByTopics on draft.topicKey) and Phase 2 (await judgeFn(draft, candidates) when candidates is non-empty). Apply the verdict policy: DUPLICATE → touch updated_at only; REFINE/SUPERSEDE → updatePage + set superseded_by; CONTRADICT → createPage (write new, keep old); UNRELATED → createPage. The function must gracefully degrade to a plain createPage when FOLIO_RECONCILE env var is not '1' or draft.topicKey is absent (verdict = 'SKIPPED'). No import outside src/services/folio/. No LLM call in the core.
acceptance_criteria: reconcilePage with FOLIO_RECONCILE unset calls store.createPage directly and returns { verdict: 'SKIPPED', page }
reconcilePage with FOLIO_RECONCILE=1 but no draft.topicKey also returns { verdict: 'SKIPPED', page }
DUPLICATE: judgeFn returns 'DUPLICATE' → only updated_at is changed; content is NOT overwritten; { verdict: 'DUPLICATE', page: existing }
REFINE: judgeFn returns 'REFINE' → existing page content replaced with draft.content; { verdict: 'REFINE', page: updated }
SUPERSEDE: judgeFn returns 'SUPERSEDE' → existing page content replaced; existing.superseded_by is set to new page id; { verdict: 'SUPERSEDE', page: newPage }
CONTRADICT: judgeFn returns 'CONTRADICT' → new page created; existing page unchanged; result includes conflict.draftSlug, conflict.conflictingIds, conflict.topicKey
UNRELATED: judgeFn returns 'UNRELATED' → store.createPage called; { verdict: 'UNRELATED', page: newPage }
judgeFn is never called when candidates list is empty (Phase 1 short-circuits to createPage with verdict UNRELATED)
All tests use a stub judgeFn (deterministic) — no real LLM call in the test suite
Module exports only reconcilePage and the Verdict type (no internal helpers)

tasks.title: MCP: folio_suggest_topic_key tool + update create/update page schemas
tasks.description: Register a new MCP tool folio_suggest_topic_key in mcp/folio-tools.js. The tool takes folioId and draftText, calls store.listDistinctTopicKeys(folioId) to get existing keys, runs store.searchPages on draftText (up to 5 results), and returns { existing: string[], suggestion: string | null } — suggestion is the topic_key of the top matching page if present in existing, else a derived kebab key. Also update folio_create_page and folio_update_page Zod schemas to accept an optional topic_key field (validated against the grammar regex). Pass topic_key through to store.createPage opts and store.updatePage updates respectively.
acceptance_criteria: folio_suggest_topic_key is listed in the 14 registered tools (up from 13)
Calling folio_suggest_topic_key on a folio with no topic_key pages returns { existing: [], suggestion: <derived-from-draftText> }
Calling folio_suggest_topic_key when an existing page matches draftText terms returns that page's topic_key as suggestion
folio_create_page with topic_key persists the value (readable via folio_get_page)
folio_update_page with topic_key updates the value on the page
folio_create_page with an invalid topic_key (violates regex) returns a Zod validation error
folio_suggest_topic_key does not call an LLM — only FTS + string manipulation
Existing folio MCP tool tests continue to pass (no schema regression)

tasks.title: Binding: wire reconcilePage into upsertPageFromAgent under FOLIO_RECONCILE flag
tasks.description: Modify upsertPageFromAgent in src/services/folioBinding.js to route through reconcilePage when process.env.FOLIO_RECONCILE === '1'. The method becomes async. When reconcile is off, the existing synchronous path is preserved byte-for-byte. When reconcile is on: import reconcilePage from the core, pass the Prism judgeFn (initially a no-op stub that always returns UNRELATED — the real Claude-backed judge is wired in FML-007). Handle the CONTRADICT result by calling the new createConflictTask helper. Add createConflictTask private helper that inserts a todo task in the space, with dedup guard (check for existing open 'Folio conflict: {topicKey}' task before inserting; add a comment if found). The upsertPageFromAgent signature gains an optional topicKey field in opts.
acceptance_criteria: With FOLIO_RECONCILE unset: upsertPageFromAgent behaviour is identical to v1.1 (synchronous, all 77 write-back tests pass)
With FOLIO_RECONCILE=1: upsertPageFromAgent is async and routes through reconcilePage
CONTRADICT verdict creates a 'Folio conflict: {topicKey}' task in the space's todo column
Calling upsertPageFromAgent twice for the same CONTRADICT topicKey does NOT create two board tasks (dedup guard adds a comment to the existing task)
upsertPageFromAgent opts.topicKey is passed as draft.topicKey to reconcilePage
A stub judgeFn returning UNRELATED is used in this task; the real judge is wired in FML-007
New integration tests cover: FOLIO_RECONCILE=1 happy path, CONTRADICT card creation, dedup guard

tasks.title: Prism: wire the Claude-backed judgeFn into folioBinding
tasks.description: Replace the stub judgeFn in folioBinding.js with a real implementation that calls the Anthropic API (Claude Haiku or configured model) to evaluate draft vs candidates. The judgeFn takes a PageDraft and Page[] candidates and returns a Verdict. System prompt: present both page contents and ask for one of DUPLICATE/REFINE/SUPERSEDE/CONTRADICT/UNRELATED with brief rationale. Parse the response to extract the verdict token. Model is configurable via FOLIO_JUDGE_MODEL env var (default: claude-haiku-4-5 or equivalent cheap model). The judgeFn is injected from store.js (the Prism entry point), not imported directly in folioBinding.js, to preserve the binding layer's testability. Add FOLIO_JUDGE_MODEL to resolveWritebackConfig in pipelineManager.js or a new resolveFolioJudgeConfig helper.
acceptance_criteria: When FOLIO_RECONCILE=1, a real conflict scenario (two pages with same topic_key and contradictory content) triggers a Claude API call and returns a verdict
FOLIO_JUDGE_MODEL env var controls the model used; defaults to a cheap fast model
If the Claude API call fails (timeout, quota), judgeFn returns UNRELATED (fail-open, never throws into the write path)
The judgeFn is injected at wiring time (store.js or pipelineManager.js), not hardcoded in folioBinding.js
Unit tests for the judgeFn mock the Anthropic client; no real API calls in CI
Total latency for a conflict detection cycle (FTS pre-filter + judge) is logged at debug level

tasks.title: pipelineManager: pass topicKey from consolidation.json through applyConsolidation
tasks.description: Extend applyConsolidation in src/services/pipelineManager.js to read an optional topicKey field from each page entry in consolidation.json and pass it to upsertPageFromAgent as opts.topicKey. The consolidation.json validation schema is extended: topicKey is an optional string, validated against the topic_key grammar regex (same as the MCP tool). Invalid topicKey values (fail regex) are treated as absent (set to undefined) with a warning log, not as page rejection. Since upsertPageFromAgent is now async under FOLIO_RECONCILE=1, ensure the await is present in the loop.
acceptance_criteria: consolidation.json pages with a valid topicKey field have it forwarded to upsertPageFromAgent
consolidation.json pages with topicKey absent or null behave exactly as in v1.1
topicKey values that fail the grammar regex are dropped with a warn log; the page is still written (topicKey = null)
applyConsolidation awaits upsertPageFromAgent correctly (no unhandled promise)
Existing consolidation tests (folio-writeback.test.js) continue to pass

tasks.title: markdown.js: round-trip topic_key and superseded_by through YAML frontmatter
tasks.description: Update src/services/folio/markdown.js to include topic_key and superseded_by in the YAML frontmatter written by renderPage and read by parsePage. renderPage: emit topic_key if non-null; emit superseded_by if non-null. parsePage: read both fields from frontmatter and pass to the returned page record (topicKey: fm.topic_key ?? null, supersededBy: fm.superseded_by ?? null). Update loadPage call in the file backend (backend.js) to pass topicKey and supersededBy from the parsed record. Extend folio-archive.test.js baseline to cover round-trip of both fields.
acceptance_criteria: A page created with topic_key='mcp-zod-schema' exported to a markdown folder has topic_key: mcp-zod-schema in its YAML frontmatter
Re-importing that markdown folder produces a page with topicKey='mcp-zod-schema'
A page with topic_key=null exports without a topic_key line in frontmatter (or with topic_key: null); reimport yields topicKey=null
superseded_by round-trips correctly (non-null UUID preserved; null tolerated absent or explicit)
folio-archive.test.js round-trip tests extended to cover both new fields
No regression in existing markdown round-trip tests

tasks.title: Tests: comprehensive coverage for FML-001 through FML-009
tasks.description: Write or extend test files to cover all new functionality. Create tests/folio-topic-key.test.js for: schema migration idempotency (FML-001), listPagesByTopics / listDistinctTopicKeys (FML-002), cluster expansion in buildContext (FML-003), reconcilePage all verdicts with stub judgeFn (FML-004). Extend tests/folio-writeback.test.js for the FOLIO_RECONCILE flag integration (FML-006). Extend mcp/tests for folio_suggest_topic_key (FML-005). Extend tests/folio-archive.test.js for markdown round-trip (FML-009). All test files must use the node:test runner consistent with the existing suite.
acceptance_criteria: npm run test:report reports all folio-* test files green
No test calls a real Claude API (all judgeFn tests use stubs)
Schema migration idempotency test verifies both ADD COLUMN guards independently
reconcilePage tests cover all 5 verdicts + SKIPPED path (flag off) + SKIPPED path (no topicKey)
Cluster expansion test demonstrates sibling retrieval with a fixture folio containing pages with topic_key set
FOLIO_RECONCILE=1 integration test verifies the CONTRADICT board card is created
FOLIO_RECONCILE=1 dedup test verifies a second CONTRADICT for the same topicKey adds a comment, not a new task
markdown round-trip test covers topic_key and superseded_by end-to-end through export/import
